creator: jhelfman@e-e.com
text:
I have updated this port so doesn't download during the build.
Builds clean in tinderbox.
Please re-consider re-evalutating this port.

Thanks!
Jason

echo c - jasperserver
mkdir -p jasperserver > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - jasperserver/files
mkdir -p jasperserver/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - jasperserver/files/pkg-message.in
sed 's/^X//' >jasperserver/files/pkg-message.in << '0173d0fa2c639a70f23678c01a5a0de2'
X
XTo use this software package, you need to properly configure and enable an application and
Xdatabase server. These components need to be enabled, respectively, in /etc/rc.conf.
X
XThe %%DATABASE%% schema and default security credentials have been copied to:
X
X%%JSHOME%%/jasperserverCreate-%%DATABASE%%.ddl
Xand 
X%%JSHOME%%/jasperserverCreateDefaultSecurity-%%DATABASE%%.sql 
X
XTake necessary precautions before loading this sql into the %%PORTNAME%% database.
X
XTo create the %%PORTNAME%% database, you may choose to run the following target against
X%%PORTSDIR%%/databases/%%PORTNAME%%-%%PORTVERSION%%-src/%%PORTNAME%%/buildomatic/js-ant
X
X./js-ant create-js-db (Creates the %%PORTNAME%% database)
X
XIf the %%PORTNAME%% database already exists, you may need to first drop the database:
X./js-ant drop-js-db (Drops the %%PORTNAME%% database)
X
XAlternatively, you may choose to use the following method to create a suitable database:
X (mysql) mysql> create database jasperserver character set utf8;
X

X# New ports collection makefile for:	jasperserver
X# Date created:				27 August 2010

X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	jasperserver
XPORTVERSION=	3.5.0
XCATEGORIES=	databases print java
XMASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/JasperServer/JasperServer%20${PORTVERSION}/:source1 \

XDISTFILES=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-src.zip:source1 \

X
XMAINTAINER=	jhelfman@experts-exchange.com

X

X

X

XSQLSRC=		${WRKDIR}/jasperserver-${PORTVERSION}-src/${PORTNAME}/scripts

XNO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes

XUSE_ZIP=	yes

XDOS2UNIX_REGEX=	.*(css|dtd|java|js|txt|wsdd|xml|xsl)$$
X
XOPTIONS=	TOMCAT5 "Enable Tomcat 5.x support"	on \
X		TOMCAT6 "Enable Tomcat 6.x support"	off \
X		MYSQL	"Enable Mysql support"		on
X
XREPLACE_FILES=	${JS}/jasperserver-war/src/main/webappAdditions/WEB-INF/web.xml
XREPLACE_LIST_TEMP=	${SUB_LIST:S/$/!g/:S/^/ -e s!%%/:S/=/%%!/}
X
XSUB_FILES=	pkg-message
X
XSUB_LIST=	DATABASE=${DATABASE} \
X		JSHOME=${JSHOME} \

X		PORTNAME=${PORTNAME} \

X		PORTVERSION=${PORTVERSION}

X.include <bsd.port.options.mk>

XUSE_MYSQL=	yes
XMYNAME?=	root
XMYPASS?=
XDATABASE=	mysql
XPLIST_SUB+=	JDBC="mysql-connector-java-5.1.5.jar" DATABASE=${DATABASE}
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_TOMCAT5)
XBUILD_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/tomcat5.5/bin/bootstrap.jar:${PORTSDIR}/www/tomcat55
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/tomcat5.5/bin/bootstrap.jar:${PORTSDIR}/www/tomcat55
XAPPHOME?=	${LOCALBASE}/tomcat5.5
XJSHOME?=	${APPHOME}/webapps/${PORTNAME}
XPLIST_SUB+=	APP_VERSION="tomcat5.5"
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_TOMCAT6)
XBUILD_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/apache-tomcat-6.0/bin/bootstrap.jar:${PORTSDIR}/www/tomcat6
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/apache-tomcat-6.0/bin/bootstrap.jar:${PORTSDIR}/www/tomcat6
XAPPHOME?=	${LOCALBASE}/apache-tomcat-6.0
XJSHOME?=	${APPHOME}/webapps/${PORTNAME}
XPLIST_SUB+=	APP_VERSION="apache-tomcat-6.0"
X.endif
X
XDBHOST?=	localhost
X
XAPP_PROPERTIES=	${SRCDIR}/${PORTNAME}/buildomatic/default_master.properties
XJS_PROPERTIES=	${SRCDIR}/${PORTNAME}/buildomatic/js-build.properties

X	@${ECHO_MSG} " [ DONE ]"
X	@( if [ -f ${JS}/jasperserver-war/src/main/webappAdditions/WEB-INF/web.xml.orig ] ; then ${RM} ${JS}/jasperserver-war/src/main/webappAdditions/WEB-INF/web.xml.orig ; else exit 1; fi )
X.endfor
X

X	else \
X	if [ -e ${HOME}/.m2 ]; then ${ECHO} A maven repository exists in your home directory. Please remove ${HOME}/.m2 and 'make clean && make' && exit 1; else /usr/bin/tar -C ${WRKDIR} -xf ${DISTDIR}/${JSMAVENTAR} && ${LN} -fs ${WRKDIR}/.m2 ${HOME}/.m2 ;fi \
X	fi
X
Xpre-build:

X	@${ECHO} "dbPassword = ${MYPASS}" >> ${APP_PROPERTIES}
X	@${ECHO} "dbHost = ${DBHOST}" >> ${APP_PROPERTIES}
X

X	@${ECHO} "repo-path = ${JSREPO}">> ${JS_PROPERTIES}
X	@${CHMOD} 0755 ${SRCDIR}/${PORTNAME}/buildomatic/js-ant ${SRCDIR}/apache-ant/bin/ant
X

X	@( cd ${WRKSRC} && ./js-ant gen-config )
X	@( cd ${WRKSRC} && ./js-ant add-jdbc-driver )
X	@( ${CP} ${WRKDIR}/web.xml ${JS}/jasperserver-war/src/main/webappAdditions/WEB-INF/web.xml )
